app.title: Hot tub
panel.waiting: Waiting for data from the spa…
chart.title: Temperature
weather.title: Outside weather
algo.scheduler_disabled: Scheduler is off — manual control only.
weather.note: The colder/windier outside, the slower the climb — the algorithm shifts the start time earlier.
weather.rate_calibrated: ↗ Climb estimated {effective}°/h — calibrated from history (loss {k_loss}°/h per °C water/air gap; water {water}°, outside {air}°)
sched.title: Schedule
cam.title: Camera
cam.state_help: Auto = let the algorithm decide from the image.
cam.roi_help: Drag a rectangle over the spa cover, then save.
cam.learn_help: Click the current state to record a visual reference.
cam.note_experimental: Experimental visual detection — partial view of the spa.
recap.title: Recap · {date}
recap.partial_view: Camera view is partial — "activity near the spa", not "in the spa".
recap.tl_help: Generated on demand from archived frames (≈ 1/min). Reload the page if the mp4 was just created.
login.title: Spa
error.title: Error {code}
error.heater_disabled: Heating stays off as long as this code is active.
error.unknown: Spa firmware error — check the Intex manual for code {code}.
error.E81: Press the GFCI reset button on the power cord (the box halfway down the cable). Also check the drain plug is fully screwed in and the water level is above the MIN line.
error.E90: Water flow problem — top up to the MAX line, clean or replace the filter cartridge, make sure no intake is blocked.
error.E94: Heater overheat — unplug for 30 min to let it cool, then check water level and filter.
error.E95: Heater overheat (variant) — same as E94: cool down, refill, clean the filter.
error.E96: Water-temperature sensor reading out of range — usually a sensor cable issue, contact Intex support if it persists.
error.E97: Heater dry-fire protection — water level too low, refill above MIN.
error.E99: Power-relay or controller fault — full GFCI reset, then unplug-replug; service if it persists.
